title: E-Commerce Platform
description: A full-stack e-commerce solution with real-time inventory management, payment processing, and admin dashboard.
longDescription: Built a comprehensive e-commerce platform featuring product catalog, shopping cart, secure checkout with Stripe integration, order tracking, and a robust admin panel. Implemented real-time inventory updates using WebSockets and optimized performance with Redis caching.

title: Task Management App
description: Collaborative project management tool with real-time updates, team chat, and advanced analytics.
longDescription: Developed a feature-rich task management application with drag-and-drop kanban boards, real-time collaboration, file sharing, time tracking, and comprehensive project analytics. Implemented WebSocket-based notifications and optimized database queries for large teams.

title: AI Content Generator
description: SaaS platform leveraging AI to generate marketing content, blog posts, and social media captions.
longDescription: Created an AI-powered content generation platform integrating OpenAI's GPT models. Features include multiple content types, tone customization, SEO optimization suggestions, and export to various formats. Implemented credit-based billing system with Stripe.

title: Real Estate Portal
description: Property listing platform with advanced search, virtual tours, and mortgage calculators.
longDescription: Built a modern real estate platform with geolocation-based search, 3D virtual tours using Three.js, mortgage calculators, agent profiles, and appointment scheduling. Integrated with multiple MLS APIs and implemented efficient image optimization.

title: Health & Fitness Tracker
description: Mobile-responsive fitness app with workout logging, nutrition tracking, and progress analytics.
longDescription: Developed a comprehensive fitness tracking application featuring custom workout builder, meal planning with nutritional information, progress photos, body measurements tracking, and personalized insights. Integrated with wearable devices via APIs.

title: Social Analytics Dashboard
description: Unified dashboard for tracking social media metrics across multiple platforms with AI insights.
longDescription: Created an analytics platform that aggregates data from multiple social media APIs, providing unified metrics, competitor analysis, content performance insights, and AI-powered recommendations for optimal posting times and content strategies.
